faq.question: How long does shipping take?
faq.answer: Shipping time depends on destination. Asia: 7-14 days, USA/Canada: 21-30 days, Europe: 25-35 days, Middle East: 20-25 days, Australia: 14-21 days.

faq.question: What documents do you provide for export?
faq.answer: We provide complete export documentation: Bill of Lading, Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Certificate of Origin, Phytosanitary Certificate, and Fumigation Certificate (if required).

faq.question: What are the payment terms?
faq.answer: We accept LC (Letter of Credit) at sight or TT (Telegraphic Transfer). Typically 30% deposit and 70% against shipping documents.

faq.question: Can I request a sample?
faq.answer: Yes! We provide 250gr sample per coffee type. Free of charge, buyer pays shipping fee.

faq.question: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
faq.answer: MOQ for green beans is 1 ton per type. For roasted beans, MOQ is 10kg per type.

faq.question: Do you have halal certification?
faq.answer: We are in the process of obtaining Halal certification. Our products are sourced from certified facilities and prepared following halal standards.

faq.question: What shipping terms do you offer?
faq.answer: We mainly offer FOB (Free on Board) from Belawan Port (Medan) or Tanjung Priok (Jakarta). CIF and other terms can be discussed.

faq.question: How do you ensure quality consistency?
faq.answer: Every batch is lab-tested for moisture content, defect count, and screen size. We also send samples to buyers for cupping before shipment.
